headline: The Hartford Named Insurance Industry Leader By Just Capital And CNBC In 2026 Rankings Celebrating The Best Of American Business
summary: HARTFORD, Conn., March 17, 2026--The Hartford was named as the top performing company in the Insurance category in Just Capital’s annual Rankings. This marks the eighth consecutive year that The Hartford has been included on the list, which celebrates companies’ leadership and performance in serving customers, communities, employees and shareholders.
